subject: biology
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ2.40
question_html:
What could be used in a technique for measuring flow rates in phloem?

I. Potometers

II. Aphid stylets

III. 14CO2

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II only

D. II and III only
examiners_html: This question had a high discrimination index.
